mechanics.excerpt: Additionally; character using stimpatch will apply 2 TN Modifier t0 any Knockout Checks Characters can gain the benefits from only one stimpatch at time The effects of stimpatch will wear off after 10 minutes_ An unconscious character can be awakened with stim- patch which requires only Simple Action_ However; the shock to the system means the character receives none of the other usual benefits of the patch: ARTIFICIAL LImBS preindustrial times simple hooks pegs served replacement limbs: Now; prosthetic limbs perform all the func tions of the original limbs Despite advances modern medical technology; artificia limbs cannot be made stronger than the original limb.
